title: Foo Bar DLQ Setup
description: Configure a dead-letter queue (DLQ) for a Kafka consumer that fails on malformed messages. The consumer currently drops failed messages; add a DLQ topic and wire the consumer to route failures there.

tasks.description: Create the DLQ topic, configure the consumer to send failed messages to it, and add a DLQ consumer that writes to analytics.dlq_events.

infrastructure.description: Redpanda with events topic (some malformed messages). ClickHouse with analytics.events. Consumer script exists but has no DLQ; failed messages are lost.
